mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, directly increasing S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 5.0%, labor market deterioration signals impending corporate earnings contraction, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in greater than 55% of instances where UNRATE crosses above 5.0%, or the signal loses predictive power during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts confirm broad-based consumer demand strength, which translates into positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint positive deviation of RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 20-day returns, or the interaction term loses statistical significance in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indicates accelerating manufacturing output and supply-side momentum, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO increases fail to predict positive 5-day returns during early-cycle phases, or the signal reverses direction when inflation expectations exceed 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained CPIAUCSL readings above 220.0 indicate entrenched inflation that forces delayed monetary tightening, compressing real equity valuations and producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns remain positive in greater than 60% of periods where CPIAUCSL exceeds 220.0, or the inflation threshold fails to separate return distributions.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirm labor market tightening that supports corporate revenue growth, yielding positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined PAYEMS and UNRATE signal fails to predict positive 20-day returns, or the interaction effect vanishes when controlling for monetary policy shifts.

mechanism_narrative: Quarterly GDP growth reflects underlying economic expansion that directly supports corporate earnings trajectories, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth rates show zero or negative correlation with 5-day forward returns across multiple quarters, or Rank IC falls below 0.01.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production falling below 90.0 signals severe supply-side contraction and manufacturing recession, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX delivers positive 60-day returns in greater than 50% of instances where INDPRO drops below 90.0, or the threshold fails to predict return direction in out-of-sample tests.
